auth.reset_email_sent: Password reset email sent! Check your inbox 📧
auth.reset_desc: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.

home.hero_desc: Medi AI acts as an autonomous receptionist — understanding patient intent, resolving conflicts, and booking appointments without any human intervention.
problems: Waiting on hold for 30+ minutes to book a slot
No-shows and last-minute cancellations with no automation
Zero insight into peak hours or scheduling efficiency
solutions: AI books in under 60 seconds, 24/7 without staff
Automated conflict resolution and smart slot suggestions
Smart reminders reduce no-shows by up to 40%
Real-time analytics dashboard with AI-driven insights

steps.name: Hello! 👋 I'm **Medi AI**, your autonomous scheduling assistant. I can book, reschedule, or cancel appointments — just tell me what you need. May I know your **full name**, please?
steps.age: Great to meet you, **{{name}}**! 😊 How old are you?
steps.gender: Got it! And what is your **gender**? _(Male / Female / Other)_
steps.symptoms: Thanks! Could you briefly describe your **symptoms** or the reason for your visit? This helps me find the right specialist for you.
steps.doctor: I've found some excellent specialists for you. Which **doctor** would you like to consult with?
steps.type: I see. Would you like to book a **General Check-up** or a **Specific Consultation**?
steps.date: Perfect! Which **date** would you prefer for your appointment? I have availability soon.
steps.slot: Great! Here are the available time **slots** for {{doctor}} on **{{date}}**:
steps.confirm: Almost done! Here's your booking summary. Shall I **confirm** this appointment? 🎉

aichat.search_docs: 🔍 I've found some available specialists for you. I recommend **{{name}}**, but please **choose the doctor** you'd prefer:
aichat.doc_choice: Excellent choice! **{{name}}** is highly recommended. Is this for a routine **Check-up** or a **Consultation**?
aichat.summary:
📋 **Booking Summary:**

👤 Patient: **{{name}}** ({{age}}, {{gender}})
🩺 Doctor: **{{doctor}}**
🏥 Hospital: {{hospital}}
📝 Type: **{{type}}**
📅 Date: **{{date}}** at **{{time}}**
💰 Fee: ₹{{fee}}

Type **Yes** to confirm or **No** to cancel.
aichat.confirmed:
🎉 **Booking Confirmed!** Your appointment with **{{doctor}}** has been booked for **{{date}}** at **{{time}}**.

📱 A confirmation SMS has been sent to your registered number.

Redirecting to your confirmation page...
aichat.cancelled: No problem! Your appointment has been cancelled. Feel free to start over anytime! 😊
aichat.none_of_these: None of these? Describe symptoms again
